title: Sword Boosted
description: The best pack to improve your Sword gameplay while keeping a simple look.
body:
**This resource pack was created with the goal of improving Sword gameplay.**

**This pack modifies several things, such as:**

**- Blocks**

**- Particles**

![Modifications](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3d4f055e12da3992eace365acd4dbfb22773f30.webp)

**Here is a list of servers where you can practice:**

**- eu.swiftpvp.xyz**

**- ukffa.xyz**

**- eu.stray.gg**

**- vexaay.nl**

**Join this server discord :**

**- https://dc.gg/pvptrain**

**- https://dc.gg/swiftpvp**

**This resource pack is compatible with many other resource packs.**

**All my packs are approved by ylesok/ykoseli.**

![PvP Tiers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/482117460d5ae30a65ccee86c89bef61972507c3_0.webp)
![Sub Tiers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d646409bf954e7bb8b6e78200ddbfaf106df85e.png)
